intent.description: Generic benchmark: delegated EOA authorization attempt.

report.summary: BLOCK: erc20 transfer classified as high risk.

findings.title: Eip7702 Authorization Present
findings.detail: Transaction contains an EIP-7702 authorization list that may delegate EOA execution authority.
evidence: expected=no authorization list unless explicitly allowed

report.recommendedAction: Do not sign EIP-7702 authorization-list transactions unless the delegate code and policy are independently verified.

policyViolations.expected: no authorization list unless explicitly allowed

intent.description: Generic benchmark: EIP-2612 permit should not bypass review.

report.summary: BLOCK: permit signature classified as critical risk.
report.explanation: AgentWarden decoded the transaction as permit signature and found 2 issues before signing. Primary finding: Intent expects an approval, but transaction performs a different action.

findings.title: Action Mismatch
findings.detail: Intent expects an approval, but transaction performs a different action.

findings.title: Permit Signature Approval
findings.detail: Permit-style approval detected. Off-chain token spending signatures must not be treated as ordinary transaction calldata.
evidence: expected=no permit or Permit2 approval unless explicitly reviewed

report.recommendedAction: Do not sign permit or Permit2 approvals until the spender, token, amount, deadline, and nonce are independently decoded and bounded.

warnings: Permit-style approval detected. This may authorize token spending through signed data rather than an ERC-20 approve transaction.
Permit-style approval detected. This may authorize token spending through signed data rather than an ERC-20 approve transaction.
Permit-style approval detected. This may authorize token spending through signed data rather than an ERC-20 approve transaction.

policyViolations.message: Intent expects an approval, but transaction performs a different action.
Permit-style approval detected. Off-chain token spending signatures must not be treated as ordinary transaction calldata.
policyViolations.expected: no permit or Permit2 approval unless explicitly reviewed

simulationResult.summary: Static analysis only. Set ANALYSIS_RPC_URL to run eth_call simulation.

report.saferAlternative: Do not sign permit or Permit2 approvals until the spender, token, amount, deadline, and nonce are independently decoded and bounded.

findings.detail: EIP-4337 handleOps transaction detected. V1 must recursively unwrap UserOperation callData before allowing it.

report.recommendedAction: Unwrap every EIP-4337 UserOperation callData item and analyze each inner transaction before signing or bundling.
